title: Template Green
description: The template textures for the grayscaled blocks
body:
![Template Green Logo](https://ewanhowell.com/assets/images/resourcepacks/template-green/logo.webp)
## Coloured versions of the grayscaled blocks
[View the pack on my website!](https://ewanhowell.com/resourcepacks/template-green)

This resource pack contains all the normally greyscaled textures in their coloured format, so that it is easy to use them for whatever you need to use them for.
